programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Matt and Alex experiment with making craters, go on a journey in a cardboard box submarine, and tell an entertaining story about Miss Octopus. Through the windows, there's some amazing sea life.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join the fun with a Wiggly Conga line, a crossword challenge with the Tree of Wisdom and Captain Feathersword, the 'Italian Word Song - O O's', a round of Guess That Animal, and a live 'Bin Night' performance.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Thomas causes confusion and delay by not seeking help when he makes a mistake.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish, Bobby and Pola go out shopping for Rosa's birthday presents, but with little time left before they have to go home, they each try to find the perfect present.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Pola has forgotten to buy the meat for the family barbecue so, to avoid the barbecue being postponed, Tish proposes they hunt for vegetables for the barbecue instead.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger teaches the baby Pea-Rexes a new survival skill through a game of hide-and-seek, but things get out of hand when Split goes missing.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 220 million years to the time of placerias, a giant hippo-like reptile that roamed the Earth alongside dinosaurs.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A lost bird needs Mojo, and Bo's hang glider, to help it get home!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Flounder is chosen as the team coach.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race. Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, Suzy and Granny Pig are visiting Grandpa Pig in the hospital today. After the Doctor's assessment, it is decided that he is now well enough to go home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's Playgroup have a new friend to meet: Mandy Mouse. Mandy uses a wheelchair. The children have a lot of fun playing with Mandy as she's super sporty and loves to play games.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie's neighbour Phillip keeps kicking his football into their garden, much to her frustration. But she soon discovers that Phillip's actions may not be so accidental after all.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Grumblestunk is sure she saw an enormous banana when she walked Stink on the beach early that morning and Stan and Gran spy a mystery, but no banana!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Professor Pickles attempts to create an EPIC historical walking trail, but he creates emergency of EPIC proportions instead!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The cadets create a fun obstacle course for the Junior Junior Cadets, but when Reef and Roadie discover there's a prize at stake, they hilariously disguise themselves as babies to steal the spotlight!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Saltwater Crocodiles
programme.desc: When a gigantic saltwater crocodile wanders into freezing waters, the Octonauts must figure out how to get the predator back to his warm water home without anyone getting hurt.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Green Goblin and Rhino steal the Dino-Webs Tree House gem and turn into dinosaurs.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises, but after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Flower loses her first tooth, she enlists Flour the cat to help keep it safe and make sure the tooth fairy can find it.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Big Lizard wants to have a go with Dad's new drone but first he has to prove that he can go a whole day without breaking something precious. Good luck Big Lizard!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on a picnic and learn about all the different ways you can eat.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle's birthday has come around again and he's not happy. He does not want a birthday party but everything has been prepared. Poor Gaston the ladybird has never had a birthday party.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Superbuns jumps into action to help find Kevin's beloved lost stuffy, Leonard, but when her super strength fails to save him she enlists GeeMaw's super robot's help.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Redbird struggles to stop Poison Ivy's schemes because he wants the spotlight. But when he needs to become invisible, he'll learn that doing good is its own reward.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. But when Coco keeps taking shortcuts, Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The flock refuse to have a wash in the freezing sheep dip, so Shaun goes on a commando raid to hi-jack the hot water from the Farmer's bath tub.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja split up to find the three Dragon Cores. Lloyd and Arin are diverted by an ocean gang and their monstrous pet crab.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Family Dynamics and a Red Fiero
programme.desc: Sheldon studies his family for a psychology project, when their Thanksgiving dinner turns into a family fight after George, Sr. is offered a job in Oklahoma.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Stunted Childhood and a Can of Fancy Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to act like a kid after learning stunted childhoods can create social outcasts. Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis's relationship is tested when she teaches him to drive.

programme.title: Ultimate Vets
programme.desc: James comes face to face with a Bichon's blockage, Rory treats a budgie in need of a nail trim and Cat helps her old pal Storm with her hormones.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Rusty the Amur tiger his sister, Yuki, thrilled everyone when they were born in 2019. Follow Rusty's last day at Longleat before he heads to his new life at Blackpool Zoo. Elsewhere in the park, the parrots have a dance off.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: An exciting new species is on its way to the park, but are the keepers ready for these ferocious predators?

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: When Merlin has an unexpected meeting with the mysterious Taliesin, the wizened old sorcerer takes the young warlock to the crystal cave and shows him a glimpse of the future. But this gift turns out to be more of a curse.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall travels to the deadliest desert on the planet, the Baja peninsula in Mexico. Steve searches for a tarantula hawk wasp, serpents, and takes to the water in the Sea of Cortez in search of the humboldt squid.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: A young American singer gets akumatised into Frightningale. Armed with a magic mic, she wants to turn Paris into a giant musical. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to keep the rhythm if they want to stop her.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.sub-title: Sugar and Spice and Lightning and Frights
programme.desc: When two new kids show up at the day care, Duncan and Leshawna take issue with, not what makes them different, but what makes them similar to the newbies.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: When a hipster grocery store clerk shames the Bears for asking for plastic grocery bags, they realize that ecofriendly tote bags are their way of gaining acceptance among the progressive people of the Bay Area.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Ranger Tabes leads a troop of young girls into a cave expedition.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Panda volunteers to be Lucy's partner for a dance contest.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears accidentally summon three mysterious witches.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Be Surprised, Universe 6! This is Super Saiyan Son Goku!
programme.desc: Goku faces the first fighter of the Sixth Universe: Botamo. Things don't look good at the start when Goku struggles from overeating, but it's nothing a little stretching can't fix.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Piccolo Vs. Frost! Stake It All On The Special Beam Cannon!
programme.desc: After Goku's defeat, Piccolo steps into the ring. Frost continues to be a challenge, and right when Piccolo is beaten, Jaco makes a discovery - Frost hasn't been fighting fair.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: The Girls learn Bliss' backstory from the Professor, Mojo Jojo, and Bliss herself.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: The Next Step hosts L'Equipe Etoile for a pre-Internationals welcome party, but not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Everything from roads to baths to pies, hosts Emperor Nero and warrior queen Boudicca are here to show what the Romans did while they were here in Britain.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Copy Cat
programme.desc: Ava is selected to deliver a speech at the town hall, but when she is accused of stealing it, Maudie must prove her innocence.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: With the help of Odd Squad, Delivery Debbie and Delivery Doug must figure out why their food is disappearing.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this episode, dinosaurs break out of the dinosaur room in headquarters, and Olive and Otto must travel back in time to save the day.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Lys sets out to find a rare creature.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: When Night Ninja needs the PJs' help, the heroes can't help taking advantage of it.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Dashi, Tweak and Peso escort a swarm of Monarch butterflies as they migrate south for the winter and have to think fast when the insects' traditional route is intercepted by a tornado.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Granny Thistle comes to visit, and gives Daisy and Poppy a powerful magical wand. The children escape from the castle and go bananas!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Abby and Rudy join in on a game of pickleball. Rudy feels frustrated when he's the only one who struggles to get the ball over the net.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel runs into Grandpere's house with dirty shoes and makes a mess. Daniel says sorry and helps Grandpere clean up.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Morgan and Amy are trying to find the mysterious and rare Atchoo bird. The Bananas are cleaning their boat with feather dusters that is making them sneeze. The Teddies hear the sneezing and think it's the bird.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas are learning to tie their shoelaces. They end up tying them to each other so they decide to have a three legged race with the Teddies.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Coco is teaching Bing and Sula how to skip but Bing hits his leg and can't understand why Sula is better. Coco shows him that with his friends' help, he can skip too.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds spend time with some gorgeous country cows and even see them being milked. It's also showtime - and our bubbly friends get to meet some prize-winners.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa brings home a teddy from playgroup to look after, but she is worried that he won't have a very exciting time.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join The Wiggles as they sing about their favourite dolls and enjoy a song about Lucia's cherished doll Curly Sue. Count, sing and dance along as The Wiggles explore the joy of friendship and dolls.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Wiggly Wave? Emma and Kaeng make a splash as they wiggle and jiggle along to Wiggerly Woo. Wiggle along any way you like!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: There's a monster in Paddington's room, so Mrs Bird takes Paddington on a monster hunt.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Great Potato Plunder
programme.desc: When Peter hears about his father's greatest ever heist, he embarks on some high risk highway robbery - Mr McGregor's entire wheelbarrow of potatoes on its way to market.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: Pharaoh Boy finds a magical stone to control cats, how will he use it to carry out his evil plan?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: The treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton awaits! If only Mojo and Bo can find it.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Juno can't wait for Juno-Mama Day, but Mama gets a cold. Vida teaches Juno to be a junior nurse instead!

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When House of Bargain gets a dodgy delivery of only left flip-flops, Louie Louis is devastated. Flower and Flour step in to show him the Luck Makers' way, proving weird opportunities can be wonderful.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit gives Peppa and her friends a tour around an exercise park. However, the machines are only for grownups, so the kids do funny exercises instead and pretend to be frogs and crabs!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: During a game of Queens, Bluey and Bingo find that playing the butler is much more fun. But someone must play the queen, even if it means not being afraid of a bit of hard work.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes' yummy drops get snatched by a group of Beetrootsaurus, so begins a game of Pea-in-the-Middle to get them back.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: In an attempt to prove which is best - the beach or the bush - Gemma and Spyke take the Junior Junior Cadets on a fun day of adventure that almost ends in disaster.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Flounder is chosen as the team coach.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Sea Sponge
programme.desc: Examining a sick sea sponge, Peso is surprised to discover that all sorts of creatures live inside it, treating it like a hotel, a behaviour known as commensalism.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Wiggly Wave? Emma and Kaeng make a splash as they wiggle and jiggle along to Wiggerly Woo. Wiggle along any way you like!

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Rachael and Kaeng discover what fun can be had on a film set. Kaeng gets into special makeup to play the film's dragon and they're joined by a talented dog named Maple.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: While on an archaeological dig, Norman and Peter get trapped on a cliff ledge while trying to find the King of Pontypandy's crown.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Silver Paw plots to steal the kids' homemade biscuits before they serve them to Nana. When Squash becomes distracted by the yummy dough, he's turned into a gingerbread man!

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit leading to interesting results.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Deepavali Fireworks
programme.desc: Nikhil and Jay celebrate Deepavali (Diwali) with their family, with kolam, laddus and bunting. But will they be able to watch the fireworks without scaring Max the Cat?

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When the Nature Explorers are playing an alphabet game, they wonder if they can continue the game by finding animals in nature that begin with the letters of their first names.

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: Mittens plays games one way and Pants another. They struggle to find a game they can both play in the same way, but puppies and kittens seem to be really different!

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: BaBa loves playing with a noisy drum but discovers that not everyone likes loud noises.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The MixMups mix up a musical adventure to find a real Magic Music Dragon. But when the Dragon loses its music, will they find another way to bring it back?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie is at school for art class, learning about coming up with ideas and how to turn a mistake into a masterpiece.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. But when Coco keeps taking shortcuts, Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds join a gymnast to spin hoops, bounce balls, and twirl ribbons! They try cartwheels, leaps, and springs, and follow an elite gymnast on the balance beam. Practice makes perfect!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: A mysterious door appears in The Makery, leading to the creation of Nim's mystery makes: fork effect emus, bee pops and a popcorn costume.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Anthony and Dorothy the Dinosaur are in the Wiggly Kitchen and someone calls Anthony to tell him the Little Wiggles are jumping on the bed, who could it be? The Dancing Water Police are here to help!

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Andy is excited because Mr Hammond has just released some pygmy geckos into the Amazon dome. But he is also worried - they're so small that they could easily get washed away in the dome's flood cycle.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Betty's ice cream is lifting everyone off the ground, and Mojo and Bo need to get them down!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard. It arrives in the post and has to be assembled. Mummy and Daddy Pig are not very good at DIY. Luckily help is to hand; Mr Zebra the Postman loves assembling flat pack furniture.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are going camping. Madame Gazelle, their teacher, is in charge.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Lou's drumming makes Kiri feel funny and wobbly all over. Pania explains that there's nothing wrong - it's called dancing.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Baby coconuts with adorable big eyes are falling out of the palm trees. When one baby coconut struggles to get the hang of their legs, Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes step in to help.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle wants fish for dinner, so he goes out fishing with Mr Elf, Ben and Holly on Mr Elf's boat. Mr Elf tells them a story about the biggest, baddest fish ever: Big Bad Barry. The king wants to catch Barry for supper.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Tidbit is so excited about his hiking badge that he gets blisters from over-preparing!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie's fun and games are temporarily stopped when Triggs' incredibly waggy tail starts accidentally knocking things over - it's almost like his waggy tail has a life of its own!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: It's bowling time! Dad thinks he's a pro - but he's the only one not scoring. Maddie and Triggs sing a doo-wop song to help him focus and find his strike!

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley helps Seamus and Little Woo reconstruct the Big Wheel from Seamus' childhood. The instructions are missing however leading to some interesting outcomes as Stanley attempts to put it together.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Sea Snakes
programme.desc: It's sea snakes on an Octopod when a poisonous sea krait lays her eggs in the garden pod, just as Captain Barnacles has to navigate the ship past a treacherous whirlpool.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Mystery Mountain Part 1
programme.desc: Mystery Mountain breaks out of its dimension and floats over the city.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels decide to play football. The Squirrels don't know what to do as they've never played football before. Worm, Hennie and Ethel do their best to show them the rules.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: In an attempt to prove which is best - the beach or the bush - Gemma and Spyke take the Junior Junior Cadets on a fun day of adventure that almost ends in disaster.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: The Why Files (Norman and Hannah) investigate a mystery involving spilled milk, a half-eaten sausage roll, and strange 'dog like' footprints...

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Mystery Plum Thief
programme.desc: When Peter tries to get the last plum from Mr McGregor's tree, he finds that a mysterious thief has beaten him to it.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Uh oh! The playground is closed for the day and Grover is beside himself. How can he play without the playground?

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel and O the Owl are at Katerina's for a sleepover. O realises it's going to be a little different than how he usually sleeps he wants to go home.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim finds a ventriloquist's dummy and explores mysterious noises in the empty room. These inspire an elephant picture, a rice cake owl and a prawn costume.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Zindzi and Rachael explore the deep blue sea as Kiya and Jemima discover an underwater volcano!; Zindzi and Dr Karl make their own volcano experiment; through the windows we tour the solar system.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join Dororthy the Dinosaur and The Wiggles singing her praise in Wiggle Town! Simon and Tsehay get into a walking competition and Simon sets out to 'Walk a Million Miles'.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Raul wants a chance to beat Thomas in a game, but his super-competitive nature soon gets him into trouble.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: It's bedtime and Rosa is about to read the story The Prince Who Saved the Princess, which Tish is not happy about.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish and Bobby are having trouble finishing their vegetables during dinner time, so Rosa and Pola have taken away the cake until they are finished.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes discover a new game: Pea-Rex Pinball. It's all fun and games until they suddenly find themselves cornered by a horde of super irritated Vegesaurs.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 106 million years to the time of the muttaburasaurus, a 9-metre-long dinosaur that lived in Australia.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: The clock tower is missing a hand, and detectives Mojo and Bo are on the case!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel uses magic to clean her room.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises, but after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: For Penny's birthday Peppa and friends are trying out ice hockey! At first, they find it difficult but eventually everyone gets a hang of it and the birthday is a success!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The children have a music lesson with Madame Gazelle and all learn how to play the recorder. After lots of practicing at home, the children put on a wonderful performance for all the parents to enjoy.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: When a rogue fly buzzes in through Maddie's bedroom window, Triggs and Dad attempt to find the most effective way of dealing with this uninvited, buzzy houseguest.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: A giant Albatross has been seen near Porthole and Stan has to spot it! But the bird's footprints are bigger than any real Albatross. What's going on?

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Hannah turns the Pontypandy Ocean Parade into a race, an ocean rescue is required.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: A day at the lake turns into chaos when Frizzy and Spyke become convinced there's a monster toad prowling the lake, the Cadets must uncover the truth behind the mysterious phantom frog.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Humphead Parrotfish
programme.desc: The Octonauts use magnets to try to stop a meteor that's heading toward the Octopod and get assistance from a rock-chomping humphead parrotfish and her friends.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Spin and his abuela go on an unexpected adventure with Black Panther in his new Panther Pod.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When House of Bargain gets a dodgy delivery of only left flip-flops, Louie Louis is devastated. Flower and Flour step in to show him the Luck Makers' way, proving weird opportunities can be wonderful.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Playing doctors Cosima discovers an animal with no heartbeat! Can Cosima and Big Lizard save the poor creature with Dad's medical kit?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: When Chipmunk's trike breaks down, the Squirrels help deliver his packages.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly invites Ben on the annual Royal Fairy Picnic. King Thistle hopes there won't be a repeat of last year's magical jelly flood.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Blossom is going to get her picture taken with her science hero, if only she can avoid all the messy obstacles on the way. Superbuns' kindness will get her there on time, and mud-free.

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: Millie, Maeve and Pia love birds. But what about the humble Ibis, or Bin Chicken? Millie loves them! They create a sanctuary for Ibises and other native birds and watch them enjoy their brand new Bird Paradise.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect, and Dad is too caught up in the game to notice.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: A circus sets up in a nearby field, and a spellbound Timmy wanders off to investigate. Can Shaun rescue him before the Farmer notices he's gone?

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Kai and the Jedi must stop Taborr's train heist.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi set out to recover a mysterious artefact.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.desc: Scooby Doo and the gang are on the case with help from Blue Falcon and his dog wonder, Dynomutt.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy confront Kara and make a plan to rescue Clark. Meanwhile, Brainiac delves into Superman's mind to figure out what makes him tick... and how to tear him apart!

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Standby for fireworks as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a monster battle between the two hard-hitting horizontal spinners. Meanwhile Madcatter tries to get its claws into Malice...

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: In the first semi-final, four Contenders battle for a coveted place in the grand final.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Arthur is pressured into an arranged marriage with a visiting princess, Elena. Merlin's reservations are vindicated when he discovers Elena may not be exactly who she claims to be.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: The Fairbairns Froth on Ratchet and Clank!
programme.desc: Gem and Fairbairn brothers play OG Ratchet and Clank, plus Mario-themed Ask SG, another Level Up Kitchen disaster, and a silly Fairbairn Brothers sketch.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Adrien's bodyguard gets akumatised into Gorizilla. Endowed with extraordinary strength and an acute sense of smell, he tracks Adrien all through Paris. Ladybug and Cat Noir can't monkey around if they want to stop him.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette, Adrien and their friends want to actively fight plastic pollution in Paris. The heroes meet an opponent more fearsome than even some supervillains. What if, Monarch decided to akumatize the baron of plastic?

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: Beth becomes the big dog on campus after she bites Duncan, but being the big dog is a dangerous thing, especially when you didn't actually bite anybody.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Charlie (aka Bigfoot) would love to find a place for himself in the world. Charlie throws a party, but ends up going on an adventure with the unlikeliest of animals - a wild snake.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: To impress Lucy Panda offers to babysit her brother, Clifford.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears book a night at a hotel for dogs.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Turn Your Anger Into Strength! Vegeta's Full-Bore Battle
programme.desc: Vegeta prepares to face Frost, who has no intention of discontinuing his cheating. But with a single hit, Vegeta knocks Frost completely out of the ring for the win.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: An Unexpectedly Uphill Battle! Vegeta's Great Blast Of Fury!
programme.desc: The battle literally heats up as Magetta starts a heatwave. Cornered, Vegeta destroys the barrier around him and unleashes his power against his opponent.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: The Girls hang out with their new big sister Bliss, who gets a taste of fighting bad guys as part of the Powerpuff Girls.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: As Internationals begins with a surprise performance, Anthony struggles with the small group dance thanks to a classic Internationals twist.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.sub-title: Loo Man's Gross Guide To HIstory
programme.desc: From bottom complaints to snot, bird poo and farts, Loo Man provides a guided tour through some of history's grossest things.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Rosemary Riddle
programme.desc: Ezra is grumpy when his visiting Nanna interrupts his detective work, until she unexpectedly gives the Inbestigators a case to crack.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this episode, dinosaurs break out of the dinosaur room in headquarters, and Olive and Otto must travel back in time to save the day.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When Otto starts shrinking, Olaf leads Olive and Oren on a quest for the only known cure - the magical growing potato.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi must free a wild creature captured by Taborr.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Pharaoh Boy absorbs the PJ's powers into his boomerangs.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Rising sea levels send Calico Jack and Kwazii on a treasure hunt adventure. At first they think a spunky sand cat stole it, but they quickly realise the sand cat is on their side.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Mr Elf is overworked, so King Thistle sentences him to a holiday. He isn't too pleased. Mrs Elf and Ben, however, are overjoyed at the news. Meanwhile, Nanny takes over the food deliveries.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Cookie Monster feels nervous about going to cooking school for the first time. Rosita shows him how to do a heart breath to help him feel better, but he's still not ready yet.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: O and Miss Elaina are playing with her robot when O accidentally breaks it. O says sorry and helps Miss Elaina fix it.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Morgan complains that he never gets any mail. He decides to write to the Bananas but their reply gets lost. Tolstoy finds it and delivers it to Morgan, just in time.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat is offering a new \.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Sula are building a stone tower when Sula finds an ammonite. Bing wants one too but is overwhelmed by the difficulty and by just how many stones there are.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: At the beach, it's so much fun making sandcastles and watching crabs. Come join our beachy bubbles and don't forget to slip, slop, slap to stay sun safe.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's Danny Dog's birthday and with the help of Grandad Dog and Grandpa Pig, the children take part in a pirate treasure hunt.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Caterina, John and Captain take turns trying to cheer up Tsehay as she is feeling a little sad today. Sing and learn with Tsehay, count with John and laugh with Simon in 'Pull a Funny Face'.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: While trying to retrieve his ball, Bitzer falls into a muddy pond. When Shaun sees a big, blobby, shambling 'thing' squelching across the field, he's convinced they are being attacked by a swamp monster. Run!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: When Lizard's potions turn him giant, he tries to take over Stark Tower and faces giant-sized Spidey.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato is having a sleepover at Tato Tower for all his friends, even Evil Pea.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle wants bread for his royal breakfast, but there isn't any flour in the castle. Mr Elf takes Holly, Ben and Nanny Plum to the Elf Windmill to find out why it takes so long to make flour.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Snobby King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit the Little Kingdom, and Holly and her mummy and daddy enlist the Elf Band to impress them.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: Flour has a small rip but refuses to be mended. Can Flower catch him before he causes any more floury chaos in the restaurant?

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Aunty Mia and Aunty Nina need the alley wall repainted, Flower volunteers herself and her friends for the task. Can Flower decide what to paint in time for the grand reveal, even with Flour's energetic help?

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel writes a song about Atlantica.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: For Penny's birthday Peppa and friends are trying out ice hockey! At first, they find it difficult but eventually everyone gets a hang of it and the birthday is a success!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: The Biggest Picture in the World
programme.desc: Super Potato is hosting a picnic but as he begins to tell his stories, the children have multiple requests for him to fulfil including flying everyone home!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: While Mum and Dad struggle to build new flat-pack furniture, Bluey and Bingo transform the empty boxes into their own new world.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control so they can all have fun.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: When Pranksy traps Deena in her original box, she's in danger of being regifted at a 6-year-old's birthday party. Jeremy and Squash must crash the party and bring her home.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Fabio's sticky sauce gets him stuck to Mojo. Is there really no way to un-stick them?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape. They decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Dad is struggling to get Maddie to brush her teeth before bed, but a musical visit from her all singing, all dancing pearly whites soon has everyone brushing in perfect harmony.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Stuck in a cave during heavy rain, Ginger and the Peas find fun playing indoors for once.

programme.title: Play School: Playtime with Pets
programme.desc: Cuddly kittens and puppies join Kaeng and Takaya on Play School! Kaeng's dog Loumi shows off tricks, Takaya makes dog biscuits, and we see what Scrap and Diddle do when alone.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Miss Pawdry stows away on a Pioneer camping trip, she leads Mandy and the rest of the Pioneers into the forest and gets them all lost.

programme.title: Builder Brothers' Dream Factory
programme.desc: Upon learning about a Scott family tall tale about their twin ancestors' daring adventures, Drew and Jonathan build a pirate ship, only to set sail through town.

programme.title: Millie Magnificent
programme.desc: When Miles misses out on seeing a beautiful rainbow, Millie tries to recreate one for her little brother, in her very own home.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: It's time for the Big Pontypandy Talent Show! But when Elvis knocks a drink over the drone control panel, the drones crash land, causing many fires.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri decides to make Lou miss her, and it doesn't go well.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo, Rosita, and Rudy are making a submarine. They need something big enough to fit all three of them.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Simon finds Bok in the Wiggly Kitchen. He loves to play Simon Says - join in and play along too! Simon is worried about Bok as he is very quiet, will the Wiggle Groove help Bok get his groove back?

programme.title: Andy and the Band
programme.desc: Andy's sister, Ruby, wants to meet her hero, superstar vlogger Fay Moss, so Andy and the Band stage a fashion photo shoot. Hopefully Fay lives up to Ruby's expectations.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Skit Skat? Emma has her dancing pants on for moving and grooving! Slide and kick along to Dancing Pants.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Three paints Two with one too many blocks and realises disguises won't help.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: One day the lights suddenly go out and Peppa's house is in darkness. There has been a power cut. While the family waits for the electricity to come on again, Peppa and George have fun thinking of games to play in the dark.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing with their bouncy ball. Suzy turns up with two tennis rackets and uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa. George feels a bit left out until he is given the job of \.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri, Lou and Sorry have a running race and Kiri is shocked to discover that their new friend is way faster than she is.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: A living vine wraps itself around the feet of Ginger and Kid Broce, binding them together. After some trial and error, the pair get used to moving as one, so much so that they don't want to become untangled.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle does not want to get any older so decides that no one must celebrate his birthday. But all of the Little Kingdom has been waiting to celebrate the king's birthday with a brilliant party.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Zigzag can't stop picking her scab! Vida has an ADHD-friendly solution.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are heading out which means Maddie + Triggs get to spend the evening with Uncle George, yes - best night ever! Let's just hope they save enough energy for tidying up!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Due to a classic McGinty mix up, Triggs ends up competing in an obstacle race, but soon discovers that playing to win and playing to have fun are two very different things.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Peggy calls Stanley up to pose for the town's art club at the community centre. Can Do! Stanley dons a firefighter's costume and strikes a pose, only for him to get distracted by a wonky shelf.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Great White Shark
programme.desc: Peso must perform an emergency fin bandage on a hungry great white shark, but first they need to subdue the giant predator using a trick called 'tonic immobility'.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Mystery Mountain Part 2
programme.desc: The story continues, after Mystery Mountain breaks out of its dimension and floats over the city.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels had a great adventure outside and want to tell everyone about it. What better way to tell a story than through a puppet show. First they make the puppets. Scissors. Card. Glue. Glitter. Feathers.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The cadets compete in a series of lifeguard challenges, but Frizzy is distracted by the promise of shiny gold medals.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Joe struggles to get the hang of his drone display for Station Officer Steele's anniversary party, he accidentally starts a huge fire.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Grumpy Owl
programme.desc: When Old Brown takes Peter's journal, Peter must choose between saving his most precious possession and saving a friend.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around the World
programme.desc: Find out how to make a Jungle Jeep in South Africa. In the UK, see if some hilarious headband ears can be made in under a minute, and in Brazil, a Mini Maker helps create a fabulous feathered-friend.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: It's a frosty morning in Wiggle Town, John seems to have lost his strength and can't lift his weights. Tsehay suggests calling Marty the Human Party, will he be able to help?

programme.title: Play School: Big Ted's Time Machine
programme.desc: Get ready to groove into the 1970s with Miah and Rachael. They lace up their roller-skates for a disco party, play music on vinyl and make tie-dye shirts!

programme.title: The Snail and the Whale
programme.desc: A beautiful tale of an unlikely friendship, a tour of the world and a heroic rescue. Based on the picture book written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler.
